'''ngagama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oshaku|oshaku]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oshaku|oshaku]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngagama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngægæmæth|ngægæmæth]] || [[word:ngægæmæj|ngægæmæj]] || [[word:ngægæmæsh|ngægæmæsh]] || [[word:ngægæmæ|ngægæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngagagamath|ngagagamath]] || [[word:ngagagamaj|ngagagamaj]] || [[word:ngagagamash|ngagagamash]] || [[word:ngagagama|ngagagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngagamath|ngagamath]] || [[word:ngagamaj|ngagamaj]] || [[word:ngagamash|ngagamash]] || [[word:ngagama|ngagama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngagafmath|ngagafmath]] || [[word:ngagafmaj|ngagafmaj]] || [[word:ngagafmash|ngagafmash]] || [[word:ngagafmaf|ngagafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngagamatha|ngagamatha]] || [[word:ngagamaja|ngagamaja]] || [[word:ngagamasha|ngagamasha]] || [[word:ngagamaka|ngagamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngagamath|ngagamath]] || [[word:ngagamaj|ngagamaj]] || [[word:ngagamash|ngagamash]] || [[word:ngagama|ngagama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngagamathal|ngagamathal]] || [[word:ngagamajal|ngagamajal]] || [[word:ngagamashal|ngagamashal]] || [[word:ngagamakal|ngagamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngagamathatha|ngagamathatha]] || [[word:ngagamajaja|ngagamajaja]] || [[word:ngagamashasha|ngagamashasha]] || [[word:ngagamaka|ngagamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngagamathan|ngagamathan]] || [[word:ngagamajan|ngagamajan]] || [[word:ngagamashan|ngagamashan]] || [[word:ngagamakan|ngagamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngagamathaoro|ngagamathaoro]] || [[word:ngagamajaoro|ngagamajaoro]] || [[word:ngagamashaoro|ngagamashaoro]] || [[word:ngagamakaoro|ngagamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
